'''âm-g-p''' ('''magapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunopotentiate|immunopotentiate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunopotentiate|immunopotentiate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-g-p
|-
! Lemma
| magapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:magapithi|magapithi]] || [[word:magapiji|magapiji]] || [[word:magapishi|magapishi]] || [[word:magapi|magapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:magaputhuth|magaputhuth]] || [[word:magapujuj|magapujuj]] || [[word:magapushush|magapushush]] || [[word:magap|magap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:magaputhu|magaputhu]] || [[word:magapuju|magapuju]] || [[word:magapushu|magapushu]] || [[word:magapu|magapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:magapufuth|magapufuth]] || [[word:magapufuj|magapufuj]] || [[word:magapufush|magapufush]] || [[word:magapuf|magapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:magapethe|magapethe]] || [[word:magapeje|magapeje]] || [[word:magapeshe|magapeshe]] || [[word:magape|magape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:magapothoth|magapothoth]] || [[word:magapojoj|magapojoj]] || [[word:magaposhosh|magaposhosh]] || [[word:magap|magap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:magapotho|magapotho]] || [[word:magapojo|magapojo]] || [[word:magaposho|magaposho]] || [[word:magapo|magapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:magapofoth|magapofoth]] || [[word:magapofoj|magapofoj]] || [[word:magapofosh|magapofosh]] || [[word:magapof|magapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:magapĂŠthĂŠ|magapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:magapĂŠjĂŠ|magapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:magapĂŠshĂŠ|magapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:magapĂŠ|magapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:magapathath|magapathath]] || [[word:magapajaj|magapajaj]] || [[word:magapashash|magapashash]] || [[word:magap|magap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:magapatha|magapatha]] || [[word:magapaja|magapaja]] || [[word:magapasha|magapasha]] || [[word:magapa|magapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:magapafath|magapafath]] || [[word:magapafaj|magapafaj]] || [[word:magapafash|magapafash]] || [[word:magapaf|magapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:magapasha|magapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomagapasha|gomagapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimagapasha|gokimagapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:magapnĂŒsha|magapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomagapnknĂŒsha|gomagapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimagapnĂŒsha|gokimagapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:magapshĂ«sha|magapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomagapnkshĂ«sha|gomagapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimagapshĂ«sha|gokimagapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:magaprosha|magaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomagapnkrosha|gomagapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimagaprosha|gokimagaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:magapmusha|magapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagapnkmusha|gomagapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagapmusha|gokimagapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:magapsherasha|magapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomagapnksherasha|gomagapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimagapsherasha|gokimagapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:magapngasha|magapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomagapnkngasha|gomagapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimagapngasha|gokimagapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:magapyasha|magapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomagapnkyasha|gomagapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimagapyasha|gokimagapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:magapyamasha|magapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomagapnkyamasha|gomagapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimagapyamasha|gokimagapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:magapnĂŒshĂ«sha|magapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomagapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomagapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimagapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimagapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:magapnĂŒrosha|magapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomagapnknĂŒrosha|gomagapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimagapnĂŒrosha|gokimagapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magapnĂŒmusha|magapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagapnknĂŒmusha|gomagapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagapnĂŒmusha|gokimagapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:magapshĂ«nĂŒsha|magapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomagapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomagapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimagapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimagapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:magapshĂ«rosha|magapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomagapnkshĂ«rosha|gomagapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimagapshĂ«rosha|gokimagapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magapshĂ«musha|magapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagapnkshĂ«musha|gomagapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagapshĂ«musha|gokimagapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:magapronĂŒsha|magapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomagapnkronĂŒsha|gomagapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimagapronĂŒsha|gokimagapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:magaproshĂ«sha|magaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomagapnkroshĂ«sha|gomagapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimagaproshĂ«sha|gokimagaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magapromusha|magapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagapnkromusha|gomagapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagapromusha|gokimagapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:magapmunĂŒsha|magapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomagapnkmunĂŒsha|gomagapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimagapmunĂŒsha|gokimagapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:magapmushĂ«sha|magapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomagapnkmushĂ«sha|gomagapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimagapmushĂ«sha|gokimagapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:magapmurosha|magapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomagapnkmurosha|gomagapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimagapmurosha|gokimagapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:magap|magap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠp|mĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homagap|homagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠgĂŠp|homĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomagap|hohomagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠgĂŠp|hohomĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmagap|nĂŒmagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠgĂŠp|nĂŒmĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmagap|nĂŒnĂŒmagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠgĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmagap|nĂŻmagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠgĂŠp|nĂŻmĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmagap|nĂŻnĂŻmagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠgĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumagap|lumagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠgĂŠp|lumĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumagap|lulumagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠgĂŠp|lulumĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limagap|limagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠgĂŠp|limĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimagap|lilimagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠgĂŠp|lilimĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komagap|komagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠgĂŠp|komĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomagap|kokomagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠgĂŠp|kokomĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemagap|kemagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠgĂŠp|kemĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemagap|kekemagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠgĂŠp|kekemĂŠgĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
